{{Quote|It's horrible, Han! All our food frozen. People dying... because we refused to surrender the Rebels on Rion!|Tana|<ref name="The 2nd Kessel Run" />}}
'''Tana''' was the proprietor of [[Tana's Resort]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rion/Legends|Rion]]. An acquaintance of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Tana opened her resort as a refuge for the people of Rion when the world was [[Devastation of Rion|devastated]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-commandeered ''[[Ionic Ring Ship]]'', which rendered Rion a frozen wasteland. Solo, who was chasing the ''Ionic Ring'', arrived shortly after and sought Tana out. Solo promised to use his connections with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to provide Rion with food, and gave Tana and her people a shipment of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to help them in the interim. In exchange, Tana provided the ''Ionic Ring''{{'s}} next target: [[Little Kessel]], allowing Solo and his friends [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to thwart the Empire's plans.<ref name="The 2nd Kessel Run" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tana appeared in ''[[The Second Kessel Run]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written by [[Russ Helm]] and released in [[1980]]. In the comic, Tana was illustrated by [[Russ Manning]].<ref name="The 2nd Kessel Run" />
